outcome.transcript:
[   1.0s] Customer: Hello?
[   8.0s] Kate: Hi, this is Kate calling about your 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee. Our system has detected that it needs service for maintenance. I'd love to help you get that scheduled at Village Jeep — does that work for you?
[  20.0s] Customer: Yeah, sure.
[  30.0s] Kate: Great! We have a few appointment times available. Would Tuesday at eight thirty in the morning, Tuesday at one thirty in the afternoon, or Wednesday at nine in the morning work better for you?
[  43.0s] Customer: Tuesday at 1.30.
[  47.0s] Kate: [happy] Excellent! So, to confirm, that's Tuesday, May twelfth, at one thirty...
